# debug

Behaves like `print` but only outputs when debug mode is enabled via `--debug` flag.

```rad
debug(*_items: any, *, sep: str = " ", end: str = "\n") -> void
```

```rad
debug("entering loop")             // -> nothing unless --debug is on
debug("x =", x, "y =", y)          // -> debug-only diagnostics
```
